OmniIntegrationProcedure.customJavaScript: { "hpfList": [ { "hpfStatus": "Prospect", "effectiveDate": null, "contractingStatus": "Prospect", "Id": "0bS7x00000039oLEAQ", "checked": true, "facilityTitle": "Ambassador NP/PA", "accountName": "BPC Hospital", "facilityId": "0hs7x0000007K8aAAE", "Contracting_Corporate_Entity__c": "0017x00001Ij4b2AAB", "accountId": "0017x000019oDCUAA2" }, { "hpfStatus": "Candidate", "effectiveDate": "2025-07-16", "contractingStatus": "Prospect", "Id": "0bS7x00000039pxEAA", "checked": true, "facilityTitle": "Ambassador NP/PA", "accountName": "Max Hospital", "facilityId": "0hs7x0000007K8aAAE", "Contracting_Corporate_Entity__c": "0017x00001Igg8RAAR", "accountId": "0017x00001IismgAAB" }, { "hpfStatus": "Prospect", "effectiveDate": null, "contractingStatus": null, "Id": "0bS7x0000003ByDEAU", "checked": true, "facilityTitle": "Ambassador NP/PA", "accountName": "Apollo Hospital", "facilityId": "0hs7x0000007K8aAAE", "Contracting_Corporate_Entity__c": "0017x00001Igg8RAAR", "accountId": "0017x00001Ij4bVAAR" }, { "hpfStatus": "Prospect", "effectiveDate": null, "contractingStatus": null, "Id": "0bS7x0000003CELEA2", "checked": true, "facilityTitle": "Ambassador NP/PA", "accountName": "Test Service Account", "facilityId": "0hs7x0000007K8aAAE", "accountId": "0017x00001CK7PLAA1" } ], "ContextId": "0017x00001EJ4ztAAD", "ContractId": "8007x00000dJfFdAAK" }
